title: proposed_change_front_matter
description: Schema for the YAML front-matter at the top of a proposed-change file at <spec-root>/proposed_changes/<topic>.md.

topic.description: Wrapper-canonicalized kebab-case topic (no -N suffix; -N is filename-level disambiguation only per v017 Q7).

author.description: Author identifier — LLM identifier, human handle, or reserved livespec-<tool> for skill-auto artifacts. The livespec- prefix is convention-only, not mechanically enforced.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp in UTC ISO-8601 seconds (e.g., '2026-04-26T09:30:00Z').

parent_proposed_change.description: Canonical topic of a parent / coordinating-epic proposed change. Format '<repo-short-name>#<topic>' for sibling repos, '<topic>' for local references.

spec_commitments.description: Optional spec→impl commitment declaration per spec.md §'Proposed-change and revision file formats' → 'Spec→impl commitment declaration'. When present, each impl_followups[] entry declares one impl-side work-item that MUST be filed in the active impl-plugin's store before the propose-change is considered closed; supersedes[] (optional) lists earlier id_hint values whose commitments this propose-change absorbs or revokes.

id_hint.description: Author-chosen kebab-case slug pairing the eventual impl-side work-item back to this propose-change via the impl-plugin's spec_commitment_hint field. NOT a generated work-item id.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the impl change required after this propose-change is revised in.

supersedes.description: Optional list of earlier id_hint values whose commitments this propose-change absorbs or revokes. The unresolved-spec-commitment doctor invariant exempts the listed id_hints from its work-item-coverage check.
